findings.message: Empty catch block — errors silently swallowed
findings.fix: Return a generic error message to users ("Something went wrong"). Log full error details server-side only with console.error(). Never expose .stack or raw error objects in responses.

findings.evidence: function clearHash() { try { history.replaceState(null, "", location.pathname + location.search); } catch (_) {} }

findings.message: Headers are configured but X-Frame-Options/frame-ancestors is missing — vulnerable to clickjacking.
findings.fix: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY header, or use CSP frame-ancestors: 'none'. If using helmet: helmet() sets this by default.

findings.message: Non-localhost HTTP URL — data sent unencrypted
findings.fix: Use HTTPS for all external connections. HTTP transmits data in plaintext — anyone on the network can read it.
